# Pull Request Template

<!-- Select the type of PR by filling the relevant section below. -->

---

## 🚀 Release PR
*(Fill out this section if this PR is a release)*

# Release: [Type] (Title)
This update focuses on **[describe the main goal of this release]**, thanks to **[User/Contributor]**'s feedback (#IssueNumber).

## Added
- **Feature/Script Name**: Briefly explain what was added and its purpose.

## Reworked
- **Logic/Component Name**: Describe what was changed or improved.

## Fixed
- **Bug**: Explain the bug that occurred and how it was resolved.

### Planned
- [x] Feature coming in the next updates
- [ ] Feature coming in future updates

> Checked items indicate features coming in the next release.

**Note:** If a section is blank, write `"Nothing [Added/Reworked/Fixed] in this version"` to maintain template structure.

---

## ⚡ Dev Progression PR
*(Fill out this section if this PR is a development/progression update)*

# Dev Progression: (Title)

## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes in this PR.

## Key Changes
- **Change**: Describe modification
- **Change**: Describe another modification

## Reference
Link related resources if applicable:
- Branch:
- Issue:
- Commit:
